panels.title: Most Expensive Prompts
panels.description: Individual messages ranked by total tokens. Identifies the single most expensive interactions.

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(m.prompt_text, 100) AS prompt, t.model, t.input_tokens, t.output_tokens, t.cache_read_tokens, t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens AS total_tokens, m.timestamp FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Most Expensive Sessions
panels.description: Sessions ranked by total tokens consumed. Highlights which conversations cost the most.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.session_id, s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens, COUNT(m.message_uuid) AS messages, s.started_at FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY s.session_id, s.project, s.started_at ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 10 Most Expensive Tools
panels.description: Tools ranked by total tokens. Shows whether Read, Bash, Write, or other tools drive the most usage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.tool_name, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.tool_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.tool_name ORDER BY tokens DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Avg Tokens: assistant_text
panels.description: Average tokens per assistant text message. This is Claude's conversational response cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens)) AS avg_tokens FROM messages m JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.prompt_type = 'assistant_text'

panels.title: Avg Tokens: tool_use
panels.description: Average tokens per tool_use message. This is the cost when Claude invokes a tool (Read, Write, Bash, etc.).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens)) AS avg_tokens FROM messages m JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.prompt_type = 'tool_use'

panels.title: Average Tokens per Message Over Time
panels.description:
Average tokens per message, by prompt type, day by day. Rising bars mean individual interactions are getting more expensive:

- `assistant_text` rising = longer answers or bigger context fed in
- `tool_use` rising = Claude is reading larger files or running heavier commands

Note: only `assistant_text` and `tool_use` appear here — those are the only messages with their own token usage. The cost of `human_input` and `tool_result` is bundled into the next assistant message's input tokens.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, m.prompt_type, ROUND(AVG(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens)) AS avg_tokens FROM messages m JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Average Tokens per Tool Over Time
panels.description: Average tokens per message, by tool, day by day. Limited to the top 10 tools by total token volume to keep the legend readable. Rising lines mean individual invocations of that tool are getting more expensive (e.g., Read pulling larger files, Bash producing larger output).

targets.rawSql: WITH top_tools AS (SELECT m.tool_name FROM messages m JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.tool_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.tool_name ORDER BY SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, m.tool_name, ROUND(AVG(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens)) AS avg_tokens FROM messages m JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.tool_name IN (SELECT tool_name FROM top_tools) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
